scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.dev:api: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && npm run prisma:seed --prefix backend && npm run start:dev --prefix backend
scripts.prod:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.prod --profile seed run --rm seed
scripts.ci:lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint:ci --prefix backend
scripts.ci:test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test:api --prefix backend
scripts.ci:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.ci:audit: npm audit --audit-level=high --prefix frontend; npm audit --audit-level=high --prefix backend
scripts.ci:docker: bash scripts/ci-prepare-env.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.ci config && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.ci build && bash scripts/ci-docker-smoke.sh
